steps.message: New lead received from contact form: {{email}}

steps.subject: Welcome to NetWebMedia, {{first_name}} 👋
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks for reaching out! A member of our team is reviewing your request and will contact you within 24 hours with a custom growth plan.

In the meantime, feel free to explore our case studies.

— The NetWebMedia Team

steps.subject: Still thinking it over? Here's a free audit idea
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Just following up on your inquiry yesterday. We'd love to run a free 15-minute audit of your site — no strings attached.

Book a time here.

steps.subject: You're registered! Here's your webinar link
steps.body:
Hi {{name}},

Thanks for registering for our webinar. You'll receive a calendar invite shortly.

We'll send a reminder 1 hour before we go live.

steps.subject: Starting in 60 minutes — webinar reminder
steps.body:
Hi {{name}},

Quick reminder — the webinar starts in about an hour. See you soon!

data.subject: Re: Premium Plan Upgrade
data.preview: Thanks for the proposal. Let me review with my team...

messages.text: Hi Sarah, following up on our call about the premium plan. I have attached the updated proposal with the volume discount we discussed.
Thanks for the proposal. Let me review with my team and get back to you by end of week. The pricing looks competitive.

data.subject: Demo Follow-up
data.preview: Great demo yesterday! Quick question about integrations...

messages.text: Great demo yesterday! Quick question about integrations - does your platform connect with Salesforce?
Yes! We have a native Salesforce integration. I can set up a technical walkthrough if you would like.
That would be perfect. How about Thursday at 2pm?

data.subject: API Documentation Request
data.preview: Our dev team needs the latest API docs for the v3 integration...

messages.text: Our dev team needs the latest API docs for the v3 integration. Can you send those over?
Of course! Here is the link to our developer portal: docs.example.com/api/v3. Let me know if your team has any questions.
Perfect, thanks! I will loop in our lead engineer.

data.subject: Whitepaper Download
data.preview: Thanks for the whitepaper! Would love to chat more...

messages.text: Thanks for the whitepaper! Would love to chat more about how this could work for our sales team.
Great to hear you found it useful! I am free tomorrow between 10-12 or 2-4. What works for you?

data.subject: Case Study Collaboration
data.preview: We would be happy to participate in a case study...

messages.text: Hi Aisha, would Nexus Group be interested in collaborating on a customer case study? We have seen great results from your usage.
We would be happy to participate in a case study. Our marketing team can coordinate. What is the process like?

data.subject: Multi-language Support
data.preview: Can we schedule a call to discuss EMEA requirements?

messages.text: Can we schedule a call to discuss EMEA requirements? We need support for German, French, and Spanish.
Absolutely! Our platform supports 12 languages including all three. How about Wednesday at 10am CET?
